resources.string: One digit correct and correct position
One digit correct but wrong position
Two digits correct but one in position
Two digits correct but one in position
Two digits correct and both in positions
%1$d digit(s) correct, %2$d digit(s) in the wrong place
I scored %1$d points in Number Detective!
You can do better! Try again!
🎉 I won in Number Detective! My score: %1$d 🎮
🎮 Can you beat my score in Number Detective? My score: %1$d

string-array.name: game_quotes
string-array.item: "Thinking is the greatest action." - Blaise Pascal
"Intelligence is the ability to adapt to change." - Stephen Hawking
"Every failure is a new beginning." - Nikola Tesla
"Simplicity is the ultimate sophistication." - Leonardo da Vinci
"Asking questions is more important than answering them." - Albert Einstein
"The brain is like a muscle; it strengthens with use." - Thomas Edison
"Learning without thought is useless; thinking without learning is dangerous." - Confucius
"The greatest victory is to conquer oneself." - Plato
"Knowledge frees man from doubt; virtue frees man from fear." - Confucius
"To accomplish great things, we must not only act but also think about what needs to be done." - Aristotle
"Once the mind accepts a new idea, it never returns to its original size." - Oliver Wendell Holmes
"Thinking people are the ones who change the world." - Mahatma Gandhi
"If you focus on problems, you will see more problems. If you focus on solutions, you will see more opportunities." - Albert Einstein
"Curiosity is the spark of knowledge." - Neil deGrasse Tyson
"The more you know, the more you can imagine." - Albert Einstein
"The problem itself is the first step toward the solution." - Carl Jung
"Thinking makes one strong; curiosity drives progress." - Marie Curie
"Only our minds set our limits." - Napoleon Hill
"Knowledge is powerless unless applied." - Peter Drucker
"If you think something is impossible, you make it impossible." - Bruce Lee
"If you're not making mistakes, you're not trying anything new." - Albert Einstein
"Asking the right question is half the solution." - Charles Kettering
"The brain is the greatest laboratory. Don't be afraid to explore it." - Carl Sagan
"Imagination is far beyond knowledge." - Albert Einstein
"Innovation starts with imagination." - Walt Disney
"Learning never ends; it lasts a lifetime." - Mahatma Gandhi
"All great achievements in the past were once considered impossible." - Thomas Carlyle
"Science begins with endless curiosity." - Richard Feynman
"The meaning of life is to create meaning." - Viktor Frankl
"A person's greatness is measured by the greatness of their thoughts." - Ralph Waldo Emerson
"Every new idea is first seen as madness." - George Bernard Shaw
"What matters in life is always looking forward." - Walt Whitman
"Knowledge is power, but wisdom is everything." - Francis Bacon
"The best way to solve a problem is to understand it." - Albert Einstein
"Success in life comes from facing our fears." - Oprah Winfrey
"Ideas that change the world start with bold steps." - Steve Jobs
"Success is another name for courage." - Winston Churchill
"If you can imagine it, you can do it." - Walt Disney
"If you're not learning anything, you know nothing." - Socrates
"Knowing yourself is wisdom." - Lao Tzu
"Challenges are the mother of creativity." - Plato

resources.string: Short-form content on social media is threatening our brains! Research shows that constant exposure to short content increases the risk of \'Brain Rot.\'\n\nKeep your mind sharp with Number Detective, and improve your logical thinking and problem-solving skills!
Invalid guess! Each digit must be different
Congratulations! Level %1$d\n+%2$d Lives and +%3$d seconds bonus!
%1$d digits in correct position, %2$d digits in wrong position
I scored %1$d points in Number Detective! Used %2$d attempts in %3$s. Can you beat my score? 🎮
Examine hints to track down the secret code.
Use logic to eliminate impossible numbers.
Enter the correct sequence and win!
A secure vault holds the data. Your objective is to crack the secret code (all digits are unique) before security locks you out.
Use the vertical cylinders to select your digits. Drag or tap them to reveal the combination you wish to test.

After each guess, check the Evidence board.

• GREEN: Correct digit in the right spot.
• CYAN: Correct digit in the wrong spot.
Success leads to harder vaults but grants more time and attempts. Clear all 3 levels to win the case.
This sequence has already been cross-referenced. Try a different combination.
System security requires all digits in the code to be unique. Re-evaluate your sequence.
Enables color-coded logic feedback for each digit in the interrogation log.
